personalAccessTokens.title: Personal access tokens
personalAccessTokens.save: Store the token below securely. You won't be able to access it again.

mfa.title: Multi-factor authentication
mfa.disabled: Multi-factor authentication is disabled, add a device to enable it.

code.title: Backup code
code.description: One-time backup codes. Each code can be used only once.

verify.title: Confirm password
verify.text: Enter your password to register backup codes.

finalize.title: Finalize backup codes registration
finalize.codes: Store the backup codes below securely. Each code can be used only once.

duo.title: Duo Security
duo.description: Duo Security is a cloud-based multi-factor authentication provider. Make sure your account (email) is enrolled into Duo Security before adding this device.

challenge.title: Initialize Duo Security
challenge.text: Approve the Duo Security notification in your Duo Mobile app to register the device.

fido.title: Passkey / FIDO2
fido.description: Passkey (FIDO2-compliant devices) authentication with any platform authenticators (e.g. fingerprint, face, PIN) or secure hardware keys (e.g. YubiKey).

challenge.title: Initialize FIDO device
challenge.text: Follow the instructions in your browser and FIDO device to initialize the registration.

otp.title: One-time password
otp.description: Time-based one-time passwords generated by authenticator app, e.g. Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, Authy, Ente etc.

verify.title: Scan QR code and register
verify.text: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app and enter the one-time code below.
